description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle features a long, cylindrical barrel with a front sight post and a slanted muzzle device at the tip. The receiver is robust and boxy, with a visible charging handle and selector switch on the side. The handguard and stock are made of polished wood, providing a distinct contrast to the matte black metal components. The magazine is curved and protrudes downward, typical of rifles designed for intermediate cartridges. Iron sights are mounted along the top, with the rear sight near the receiver and the front sight at the end of the barrel.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a slanted muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow width, alignment of the barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the other profile, magazine, and wooden components.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the magazine, trigger guard, and stock.
